description: The company uses virtual credit cards (V-Cards) for some purchases. The AP team needs to reconcile the V-Card statement with the purchase transactions.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the monthly statement from the virtual card provider.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the statement listing all charges.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all internal purchase records where a virtual card was used as the payment method.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the list of internal V-Card transactions.

nodes.task_description: Match the transactions on the statement to the internal purchase records.
Create the journal entry to record the expenses and the payment from the V-Card provider.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the journal entry to correctly record the activity from the V-Card statement.
